scope: Fresh schema/action benchmark: train LayerCake and BPE transformer on the same generated XML/JSON/app-edit corpus, then ask seen and held-out task questions. Quality is parsed JSON exactness and character similarity, not a flat rubric score.

samples.name: heldout_relevance_xml_00
samples.prompt: Question: Given an XML node <item id="42">ok</item>, produce the matching JSON object. Answer:

samples.prompt: Question: Given an XML node <item id="71">ready</item>, produce the matching JSON object. Answer:
